info.name: Calendar Backend API
info.description: Complete API collection for Calendar Backend with all endpoints

request.description: Refresh access token using refresh token
Get all active sessions for current user
Redirect to Google OAuth login (no JWT needed)

Get all organizations for current user (personal + teams)
Send invitation to join organization (Owner/Admin only)

Link a Google Calendar event to a Meeting in DB

request.description: Get meetings without pagination (max 1000 for calendar view)

Get available slots (complex algorithm combining all rules)
Get consultant profile and available slots (no auth required)
